creative_premise: The Weather Inside a Bell is a full-screen browser instrument where held pressure becomes a visible and optional audible weather release.
completed_slice: Added a bounded barometric hold-and-release law: pointer or Space-key holds accumulate visible pressure, compress the instrument, and release a force-scaled shockwave and bell strike.

verification.reduced_motion: ambient time freezes while direct shockwave state remains visible
